# Example Profile: VS Code Weekly

- profile_name: vscode-weekly
- repository: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode.git
- branch: main
- period_days: 7
- output_path: vscode-weekly-newsletter.md
- title_style: VS Code Dev Digest - Weekly

Editorial focus:
- Prioritize editor UX improvements, performance, extension API changes, debugging improvements, terminal updates, and accessibility fixes.
- De-emphasize routine dependency bumps unless they affect users or extension developers.
- Deep-dive candidates: architectural editor changes, large performance wins, breaking extension API behavior.

Section preferences:
- Keep sections in this order: Newly Shipped, Extension/Platform Impact, Performance, Bug Fixes, Follow-ups.
- Include one short "What this means for extension authors" subsection when relevant.

Tone and format:
- Audience: developers using VS Code daily, plus extension maintainers.
- Keep concise but technical; explain specialized internals briefly.
